reason: Verified that the GitHub tool integration works correctly - agent successfully retrieved the authenticated user's GitHub username after requesting and receiving account access and API permission.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Clicked on "QA-20260401-180634-c5bk" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page loaded with "idle" status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator showed blue "idle" badge in header
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message appeared in input field
Sent message via Cmd+Enter - Message submitted and agent started processing
Agent status changed to "working" then "awaiting input" - GitHub account access request card appeared
Selected GitHub account checkbox - Checkbox became checked, "Grant Access" button became enabled
Clicked "Grant Access" button - Agent resumed processing, status returned to "working"
Agent displayed "API Request Review" for GitHub GET /user endpoint - Card showed required scopes (user, read:user)
Clicked "Allow" button on API request review - Permission granted, agent resumed processing
Waited for agent response - Agent completed in 1m 30s and returned response
Verified response contains GitHub username - Response displayed "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing the complete response with GitHub username
